topic: Will AI eliminate most creative professions by 2040?

payload.topic: Will AI eliminate most creative professions by 2040?
payload.story_focus: AI disruption across creative labor markets
payload.strategic_angle: Will AI eliminate most creative professions by 2040
payload.fused_conflict: What cross-domain forces decide AI disruption across creative labor markets?
fused_clip_structure: Claim — AI automation threatens creative professions and reshapes the labor market by 2040 with future forecast evidence.
Evidence — compare workflow automation, generative tools, labor displacement, client demand, workforce economics, trend signals, and prediction models across creative industries.
Verdict — which creative roles shrink, which survive, and what human judgment still drives premium work by 2040?
payload.fused_setting: a cross-disciplinary research studio with algorithm dashboards, product prototypes, and market evidence boards
